zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha Duchess of Brittany於大約1113年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特利蒙特時，她的父親Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne21歲，母親Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany24歲。她於1139年與Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond在法國波特芝士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1164年享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha Duchess of Brittany于大约1113年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特利蒙特时，她的父亲Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne21岁，母亲Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany24岁。她于1139年与Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond在法国波特芝士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1164年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha Duchess of Brittany was born about 1113, in Richemont, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, was 21 and her mother, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, was 24. She married Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond in 1139, in Poitou, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1164, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha Duchess of Brittany est née environ 1113, à Richemont, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond en 1139, à Poitou, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1164, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha Duchess of Brittany um 1113 in Richemont, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne 21 und ihre Mutter Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany 24. Sie hat 1139 in Poitou, Frankreich Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1164 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha Duchess of Brittany è nata il circa 1113 nel Richemont, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond nel 1139, nel Poitou, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1164, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha Duchess of Brittanyが約1113年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントリケモントで生まれた時，父Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagneは21歳，母Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittanyは24歳であった。1139年にフランスポイトウでAlan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1164年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha Duchess of Brittany(이)가 대략 1113년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 리체몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1139년 프랑스 포이토우에서 Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1164년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1113–Abt 1164: tany ho any amin'ny 1113–tany ho any amin'ny 1164

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha Duchess of Brittany nasceu aproximadamente 1113, em Richemont, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond em 1139, em Poitou, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1164, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha Duchess of Brittany родилась около 1113 г. в местности ричемонт, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond в 1139 г. в местности поитоу, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1164 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

sm.about 1113–Abt 1164: e tusa o le 1113–e tusa o le 1164

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertha Duchess of Brittany nació aproximadamente 1113, en Richemont, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond en 1139, en Poitou, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1164, a la edad de 53 años.
